overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at night. The character moves from a riverside entrance through cobblestone streets, past market stalls and guards, eventually passing through a stone gate into an inner courtyard. Warm firelight from torches and braziers illuminates the timber-framed architecture against a dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside village entrance with grass verges

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path from the waterfront into the village outskirts

notable_agents.action: shirtless man walking ahead on the left side of the path

entered.detail: multi-story medieval house with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
circular stone well with wooden roof structure near the water
simple wooden picket fence lining the grass verge
metal fire pit with flames providing warm orange light
wooden bench where a villager sits near the fire

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cobblestone path leading into a medieval village at night. Timber-framed houses line the route while a stone well sits near the waterfront. The character walks past a wooden fence and a burning brazier where a villager rests on a bench, with warm firelight contrasting against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village market square with training area

events.description: character turns right to observe two men fighting near a fire
character turns back to original direction and continues walking

agents.ego_description: pausing to watch two shirtless men sparring near a campfire before continuing

notable_agents.action: two shirtless men practicing fist fighting near a burning barrel

entered.detail: market stall with canvas roof and wooden support posts
circle of wooden barrels with a fire burning in the center

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small market square dominated by a wooden stall and a circle of barrels with a central fire. After pausing to watch two men sparring near the flames, the character continues past the market area, leaving the riverside fence behind as the buildings shift position in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street with guard patrol

events.description: entering darker narrow street between tall timber buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down a dimly lit street passing guards carrying torches

notable_agents.action: armed guard in red armor carrying a lit torch

entered.detail: large stone gate structure with wooden doors leading to inner village
wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the street side
wooden fence barrier blocking off a side area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker, narrower street flanked by tall timber houses. The character approaches a large stone archway gate in the distance while passing a wooden cart and guards carrying torches. The market stalls fall behind as the environment becomes more enclosed and shadowy.

scene_state.functional_zone: village gate approach with gathering crowd

events.description: crowd density increases near the gate with musicians playing lutes

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone gate where villagers gather around fires and musicians play

notable_agents.action: musician playing a stringed instrument near a fire

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to a building entrance with a wooden door
overhanging wooden balcony on the upper floor of a timber house
wall-mounted iron torch holder with burning flame

segments.scene_description: As the character nears the stone gate, the street widens slightly and more villagers appear, gathered around fires. A musician plays on the right while the stone archway looms larger ahead. The wooden cart and barricade pass out of view as stone stairs and a wooden balcony come into frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner village square with central fountain

events.description: passing through the stone archway into the inner courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate into a busy inner courtyard with various villagers milling about

notable_agents.action: villager in red coat carrying a package through the square

entered.detail: tunnel-like passage through the thick stone gate wall
circular stone fountain in the center of the courtyard
market tent with striped canvas roofing
wooden market stall with goods displayed

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway into a spacious inner courtyard. A central stone fountain anchors the square, surrounded by timber houses and market tents. The gate structure falls behind as the character moves deeper into the bustling inner village area, passing various NPCs and wooden stalls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open riverside entrance into the enclosed, shadowy depths of a medieval village at night. It begins on a cobblestone path lined with timber-framed houses and a stone well, moving past a burning brazier that casts a warm glow against the dark blue sky. As the character advances, the scene opens into a small market square featuring wooden stalls and a central fire where men spar, before the riverside fence fades from view. The environment then shifts into a narrower, darker street flanked by tall buildings, passing a wooden cart and torch-bearing guards. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the enclosing shadows toward a large stone archway gate in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow village street into a spacious, bustling inner courtyard. It begins as the character nears a looming stone gate, passing a musician and villagers gathered around fires while wooden barricades recede from view. As the camera advances, stone stairs and a wooden balcony emerge into frame, leading the way toward the archway. The scene then opens wide as the character passes through the gate, leaving the entrance behind to reveal a central stone fountain anchored within a square of timber houses and market tents. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the heart of the village, gliding past various NPCs and wooden stalls under the night sky.
